title: Basic Shields
description: Adds vanilla-style shields for each material. All shields fully support banners!
body:
### Description:
Basic Shields adds vanilla-style shields to Minecraft for each material. All shields fully support banners!

A neoforge port is in progress...

---

![diamond shield showcase](https://i.imgur.com/YrPF2s6.png)

---

### Integrations:
Currently, the only integration is for TechReborn in v1.1.0
![TechReborn integration preview](https://i.imgur.com/9t0kgKK.png)

---

### Requires [Shield Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/shieldlib).
